Package org.episteme.natural.biology.loaders.neuroml

package org.episteme.natural.biology.loaders.neuroml
NeuroML loader for computational neuroscience models.

Parses NeuroML v2 files containing neuron morphology, biophysics, and networks.

See Also:
  • NeuroML.org
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.episteme.natural.biology.loaders
     
    org.episteme.natural.biology.loaders.biopax
    BioPAX loader for biological pathways and networks.
    org.episteme.natural.biology.loaders.itis
    Biological taxonomy, genetics, and physiological modeling.
    org.episteme.natural.biology.loaders.pdbml
    PDBML loader for Protein Data Bank macromolecular structures.
    org.episteme.natural.biology.loaders.phyloxml
    PhyloXML loader for phylogenetic tree data.
    org.episteme.natural.biology.loaders.sbml
    Systems Biology Markup Language (SBML) loader for Episteme.
  • Class
    Description
    BiophysicalProperties
    Biophysical (electrophysiological) properties.
    Cell
    Represents a neuron cell in NeuroML.
    ChannelDensity
    Density of ion channels on membrane.
    IonChannel
    Ion channel model.
    Morphology
    Cell morphology with segments.
    Network
    Neural network with populations and projections.
    NeuroMLBridge
    Bridge for converting NeuroML DTOs to core Episteme domain objects.
    NeuroMLDocument
    NeuroML document container.
    NeuroMLException
    Exception for NeuroML parsing errors.
    NeuroMLReader
    NeuroML Reader for computational neuroscience models.
    Point3D
    3D point with diameter for morphology.
    Population
    Population of neurons of the same cell type.
    Projection
    Synaptic projection between populations.
    Segment
    A segment (compartment) of a neuron.
    SegmentGroup
    Group of segments (e.g., soma, axon, dendrite).
    Synapse
    Synapse model (exponential decay).
